line_items.label: Revenue
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Revenue'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-30' has name='us-gaap:Revenues' with contextRef='c-1' and scale=6, value 44062. Tag id='f-31' has contextRef='c-3' value 26044. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:Revenues = $44,062M and $26,044M for these periods.

line_items.label: Cost of Revenue
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Cost of revenue'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-32' has name='us-gaap:CostOfRevenue' contextRef='c-1' scale=6 value 17394. Tag id='f-33' contextRef='c-3' value 5638. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:CostOfRevenue = $17,394M and $5,638M.

line_items.label: Gross Profit
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Gross profit'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-34' has name='us-gaap:GrossProfit' contextRef='c-1' scale=6 value 26668. Tag id='f-35' contextRef='c-3' value 20406. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:GrossProfit = $26,668M and $20,406M.

line_items.label: Research and Development
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Research and development'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-36' has name='us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense' contextRef='c-1' scale=6 value 3989. Tag id='f-37' contextRef='c-3' value 2720. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense = $3,989M and $2,720M.

line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Sales, general and administrative'. line_items.label: Total Operating Expenses
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Total operating expenses'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-40' has name='us-gaap:OperatingExpenses' contextRef='c-1' scale=6 value 5030. Tag id='f-41' contextRef='c-3' value 3497. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:OperatingExpenses = $5,030M and $3,497M.

line_items.label: Operating Income
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Operating income'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-42' has name='us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss' contextRef='c-1' scale=6 value 21638. Tag id='f-43' contextRef='c-3' value 16909. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss = $21,638M and $16,909M.

line_items.label: Interest Income
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Interest income'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-44' has name='us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest' contextRef='c-1' scale=6 value 515. Tag id='f-45' contextRef='c-3' value 359. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest = $515M and $359M.

line_items.label: Interest Expense
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Interest expense'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-46' has name='us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating' contextRef='c-1' scale=6 value 63 (displayed with parentheses in HTML indicating it reduces income, but XBRL value is positive 63). Tag id='f-47' contextRef='c-3' value 64. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating = $63M and $64M.

line_items.label: Other Income (Expense), Net
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML table row text is 'Other income (expense), net'. The ix:nonFraction tag id='f-48' has name='us-gaap:OtherNonoperatingIncomeExpense' contextRef='c-1' scale=6 sign='-' value 180, resulting in XBRL value of -180. Tag id='f-49' contextRef='c-3' value 75. XBRL fact list confirms us-gaap:OtherNonoperatingIncomeExpense = -$180M and $75M.

line_items.label: Total Other Income (Expense), Net

Tag id='f-53' contextRef='c-3' value 17279. XBRL fact list confirms = $21,910M and $17,279M.

formulas.formula: Revenue - Cost of Revenue = Gross Profit
Research and Development + Sales, General and Administrative = Total Operating Expenses
formulas.operation: Research and Development + Sales, General and Administrative

formulas.formula: Gross Profit - Total Operating Expenses = Operating Income
Interest Income - Interest Expense + Other Income (Expense), Net = Total Other Income (Expense), Net
formulas.operation: Interest Income - Interest Expense + Other Income (Expense), Net

formulas.formula: Operating Income + Total Other Income (Expense), Net = Income Before Income Tax
formulas.operation: Operating Income + Total Other Income (Expense), Net

formulas.formula: Income Before Income Tax - Income Tax Expense = Net Income
formulas.operation: Income Before Income Tax - Income Tax Expense

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: D&A of $611M is tagged in XBRL but does not appear as a line item on the income statement. It appears as an adjustment in the cash flow statement reconciliation of net income to operating cash flows.
D&A of $410M is tagged in XBRL but does not appear as a line item on the income statement. It appears as an adjustment in the cash flow statement reconciliation of net income to operating cash flows.

Stock-based compensation expense of $1,474M is tagged in XBRL (us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation) for cash flow purposes and also disclosed in the notes (Note 2), but does not appear as a separate line item on the face of the income statement. It is embedded within Cost of Revenue and Operating Expenses line items.
Stock-based compensation expense of $1,011M is tagged in XBRL for cash flow purposes and disclosed in notes, but not a separate line item on the income statement.

Gains (losses) on investments of -$175M is tagged in XBRL as a cash flow adjustment line item. It is a component of 'Other income (expense), net' on the income statement but not separately disclosed as a line item on the face of the income statement.

Gains (losses) on investments of $69M is tagged in XBRL as a cash flow adjustment line item. It is a component of 'Other income (expense), net' on the income statement but not separately disclosed on the face of the income statement.
Deferred income taxes of -$2,177M is tagged in XBRL but appears only as a non-cash adjustment in the cash flow statement, not as a separate line item on the income statement.
Deferred income taxes of -$1,577M is tagged in XBRL but appears only as a non-cash adjustment in the cash flow statement, not as a separate line item on the income statement.

Total allocated SBC expense of $1,474M is disclosed in Note 2 (stock-based compensation disclosure table) and segment reconciliation table but is not a separate line item on the face of the income statement.
Total allocated SBC expense of $1,011M is disclosed in Note 2 and segment reconciliation table but is not a separate line item on the face of the income statement.
Amortization of intangible assets of $159M is disclosed in Note 7 but does not appear as a separate line item on the income statement. It is included within operating expenses.
Amortization of intangible assets of $143M is disclosed in Note 7 but does not appear as a separate line item on the income statement. It is included within operating expenses.

Inventory write-down/provision of $2,300M (including $1.9B for H20 products) is disclosed in Note 8 balance sheet components footnote. It is included within Cost of Revenue but not a separate line item on the income statement face.
Inventory write-down of $210M is disclosed in Note 8 footnote but not a separate line item on the income statement face; included within Cost of Revenue.
Net change in unrealized gain on available-for-sale securities of $139M appears on the Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income, not on the income statement.
Net change in unrealized gain on cash flow hedges of $19M appears on the Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income, not on the income statement.
Other comprehensive income, net of tax of $158M appears on the Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income, not on the income statement.
Total comprehensive income of $18,933M appears on the Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income as a subtotal, not on the income statement itself.
Operating lease expense of $101M is disclosed in Note 14 (Leases) but does not appear as a separate line item on the income statement.

formula_checks.formula: Revenue - Cost of Revenue = Gross Profit
Research and Development + Sales, General and Administrative = Total Operating Expenses
Gross Profit - Total Operating Expenses = Operating Income
Interest Income - Interest Expense + Other Income (Expense), Net = Total Other Income (Expense), Net
Operating Income + Total Other Income (Expense), Net = Income Before Income Tax
Income Before Income Tax - Income Tax Expense = Net Income
